name: SATGO – Outstanding Youth Province Award
description: A premier recognition awarded to a Youth Province demonstrating excellence across multiple areas of ministry, innovation, empowerment, and leadership development.

fields.label: Describe the vision, strategy, and leadership approach driving the Youth Province.
In what way has the province impacted its members through technology initiatives? (digital platforms, media, coding/tech training, digital evangelism)
What strategic initiatives by the province have brought financial growth for its members? (financial literacy, entrepreneurship, economic empowerment)
Describe skills and training programs developed for youths within the province in the last year (vocational training, career development, professional skills).
Describe agricultural or sustainability initiatives performed by the province in the last year.
What has been the province's strategy in the last year to develop leaders? (mentorship, leadership academy, service opportunities)

sections.title: Measurable Impact in the Last One Year

fields.label: Number of Youth Who Have Started Businesses / Careers / Leadership Roles
Why should this Youth Province receive the SATGO Outstanding Youth Province Award?
Supporting Document Upload (program reports, pictures, videos, financial empowerment evidence, training records, testimonies, media links)

sections.title: Rate the Youth Province (1 = poor, 10 = outstanding)
